title: Backported
description: Backports several tweaks from newer versions to older versions
body:
# Backported

Backports several tweaks from newer versions to older versions.

## Currently backported changes:

*   New Ghast Texture
*   New Spawn Egg Textures
*   New Redstone Torch Textures
*   New Cloud Textures
*   New Dye Textures
*   New Banner Pattern Textures
*   New Leather Horse Armor Textures (Unfortunately, do to limitations with older versions of minecraft all of the armor is tinted instead of only certain areas.)
*   New Zombie Horse Texture
*   Renamed Chain to Iron Chain
*   New Saddle Recipe
*   New Lodestone Recipe
*   New Lead Recipe
*   New Bundle Recipe

## FAQ

### Can I use backported in my modpack?

Of course! Just don't claim that you made it and the modpack needs to be on modrinth.

### Will you port to x version or modloader?

Other versions and modloaders are not planned to be supported at the moment.

### I found a bug, where do I report it?

You can report it in the bug reports channel in the support discord: [https://discord.gg/T9cNptzn8z](https://discord.gg/T9cNptzn8z)
